title_statement.title: Institutional and policy analysis of river basin management: the Gudalquivir River Basin, Spain

document_description.abstract: The authors describe and analyze river basin management in the Guadalquivir River Basin in Spain. The Guadalquivir river flows westerly across southern Spain, with nearly all of its 57,017 k

document_description.disclaimer: The Policy Research Working Paper Series disseminates the findings of work in progress to encourage the exchange of ideas about development issues.
